Maternal, Child and Adolescent Health
Central Referrals - Confidential Referrals Unit
About the Central Referral Unit:
The MCAH Confidential Referrals department processes and assigns all referrals received, the staff provide guidance and additional referrals, including prenatal care, to county and community agencies, based on the individual’s needs.
1-877-680-BABY (2229)
Confidential Referral Form
www.babyfirstsolano.org
Maternal Child & Adolescent Health (MCAH) accepts referrals for all its programs through one centralized referral line.
All of our programs support Solano County moms, children and families.
These Programs Accept Referrals:
Solano County, Black Infant Health (BIH)
Childhood Lead Poisoning Prevention
​​Healthy Families Solano County™​
Nurse-Family Partnership (NFP)
Community Nursing IMPACT Program
Sudden Infant Death Syndrome (SIDS)
Tips for Providers Sending Referrals:
Ask for client’s verbal or written consent.
If you are unsure which program to refer the client to, fill out the comments section in detail and leave the programs box unchecked.
Complete all questions on the
Confidential Referral Form
. If the answer is not applicable, please mark N/A on the field.
Thank you for doing your part in supporting Solano County mothers, children and families live healthy, productive lives!
